_comment: Recitation + tajweed scoreboard, produced by the Swift harness (SiraatTests/RecitationEvalHarness.swift) over the in-CI synthetic fixtures. The honesty numbers (hard_false_positive_rate, tajweed false_positive_rate) must never regress above 0. See eval/README.md.

follow_along._comment_baseline: The pre-streaming baseline (Milestone 0): the index matcher was honest but blind — 0% completeness on a leading isti'adha and 0 mistake recall. Kept here for posterity.
follow_along.notes: M1/M2 (streaming forced-alignment) lifted follow-completeness from 0.61 to 1.00 on these fixtures with hard-FP staying 0. M3 (honest mistake detection) lifts mistake recall from 0.00 to 1.00 at precision 1.00 — every seeded skip and substitution caught, zero false accusations on correct/isti'adha/repeat fixtures. Three honesty gates in the detector: only flag past the alignment head, never flag known optionals or stutter-repeats, and (live) only fire after the streaming confirmer sees the same finding twice.

tajweed.notes: The character evaluator is precise and complete on the rules it covers (Madd length, Ghunnah duration, confident wrong letter). The gap is COVERAGE, not logic: qalqalah/idgham/ikhfa/iqlab are absent, the shipped blueprint is Al-Fatiha only and verified:false, and consonants stay ungraded until the model's romanization is confirmed. Production grading stays gated on source.verified == true (Qari sign-off).
